zh.lifeSummary: 當SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON於大約1170年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾布拉可哈爾時，他的父親Third Earl Leicester Robert III de Beaumont50歲，母親Petronella de Grandmesnil37歲。他和LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK至少有2個兒子。他去世於1228年在他的家鄉享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON于大约1170年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾布拉可哈爾时，他的父亲Third Earl Leicester Robert III de Beaumont50岁，母亲Petronella de Grandmesnil37岁。他和LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK至少有2个儿子。他去世于1228年在他的家乡享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: HAMILTON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: habitational name from what is now a deserted village in the parish of Barkby, Leicestershire. This is named from Old English hamel ‘crooked’ + dūn ‘hill’. Hamilton near Glasgow was founded by the English Hamiltons and named after them, and later bearers took their surname from the Scottish place. In the north of Ireland, where many Hamiltons settled in the 17th century, this surname may sometimes have been adopted for Hamill . It has also been adopted as an Anglicized form of southern Irish Ó hUrmholtaigh.

History: This name is borne by one of the most distinguished families of the Scottish nobility; they hold many titles, including marquessate and dukedom of Hamilton, the marquessate of Douglas, the dukedom of Abercorn, and the earldom of Haddington. They are descended from Walter FitzGilbert de Hameldone, a Norman baron who gave his support to Robert the Bruce in the 13th century. A member of this family was Sir William Hamilton (1730–1803), a British diplomat and archaeologist, whose wife, Lady Emma Hamilton (c. 1765–1815), became the mistress of Admiral Horatio Nelson. A branch of the family was established in Ireland by Sir Frederick Hamilton (died 1646), who served in the Swedish army of Gustavus Adolphus. He later became governor of Ulster, and his descendants were created viscounts Boyne. The family have given their name to Newtownhamilton and Hamiltonsbaron in County Armagh. Another branch of the family were to be found in Denmark, where Henrik Albertsen Hamilton (1588–1648) was a noted Latin poet. A 17th-century example of a Hamilton from Glasgow, Scotland, is recorded in the Netherlands, where the name is found in the form Hamelton. Another Scottish Hamilton, James, went to the West Indies in the 18th century and was the father of Alexander Hamilton (1755–1804), who arrived in NY in 1772 and became the first US secretary of the Treasury.

variants.name: Hamill
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Haineville or Henneville in Manche, France, named from the ancient Germanic personal name Hagano + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
English (Lancashire): nickname for a maimed person or someone with a distinctive scar, from Middle English, Old English hamel ‘mutilated, scarred’.
Irish (Ulster): according to MacLysaght, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÁdhmaill ‘descendant of Ádhmall’, which he derives from ádhmall ‘active’.

nameMeanings.name: WILLIAM
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON was born about 1170, in Blackhall, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Third Earl Leicester Robert III de Beaumont, was 50 and his mother, Petronella de Grandmesnil, was 37. He had at least 2 sons with LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK. He died in 1228, in his hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON est né environ 1170, à Blackhall, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Third Earl Leicester Robert III de Beaumont, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Petronella de Grandmesnil, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK. Il est décédé en 1228, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON um 1170 in Blackhall, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Third Earl Leicester Robert III de Beaumont 50 und seine Mutter Petronella de Grandmesnil 37. Er hatte mit LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1228 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON è nato il circa 1170 nel Blackhall, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Third Earl Leicester Robert III de Beaumont, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Petronella de Grandmesnil, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK. Morì nel 1228, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTONが約1170年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアブラックハルで生まれた時，父Third Earl Leicester Robert III de Beaumontは50歳，母Petronella de Grandmesnilは37歳であった。彼はLADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCKとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1228年に故郷で59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON(이)가 대략 1170년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 블랙홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Third Earl Leicester Robert III de Beaumont(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Petronella de Grandmesnil(은)는 37세였다. 그는 LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1228년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Blackhall, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Third Earl Leicester Robert III de Beaumont, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Petronella de Grandmesnil, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK. Ele faleceu em 1228, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON родился около 1170 г. в местности блэккхолл, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Third Earl Leicester Robert III de Beaumont было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Petronella de Grandmesnil, 37. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK. Он умер в 1228 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON nació aproximadamente 1170, en Blackhall, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Third Earl Leicester Robert III de Beaumont, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Petronella de Grandmesnil, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK. Murió en 1228, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años.
